title: Meliosma dilleniifolia

The classification of Meliosma dilleniifolia is further divided into the kingdom Plantae and the order Alismatales. It is an endangered species due to its restricted habitat and limited geographical range.

The Meliosma plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its various health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which help to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
